finance.summary: Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and energy shocks dominate the financial landscape; global markets face rising inflation concerns with Fed rate cuts unlikely in the near term; 'dash for cash' intensifies.
highlights: Brent crude rises above $110/barrel due to Middle East energy crisis
Money market funds reach record $7.86 trillion
Zions Bancorporation acquires Fannie/Freddie business line

art.summary: March 2026 features major global exhibitions, including Yayoi Kusama's 50th-anniversary retrospective in Cologne and the return of TEFAF in Maastricht.
highlights: Museum Ludwig hosts massive Yayoi Kusama retrospective
Dallas Design District launches 'Art Docks' mural project
25th Biennale of Sydney explores themes of 'Rememory'
